system.requirement: If you wear a full set of heavy set plate armor...

abilities.description: Mark the impact Encumbered while wearing your armor. When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.e6ed148eff82c171]{Face Danger}, @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.d9208f9b7d827aec]{React Under Siege}, or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash} against physical attacks or impact, you may rely on your armor's strength. If you do, preset your action die to 4. On a string hit with a match, take +2 momentum as you build confidence, make an impression on your foes, or improve your position.
You add an important new piece to our armor, or upgrade its materials. As above, but preset your action die to 5 instead of 4.

When you must @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.905205c073b09eac]{Endure Harm}, you may instead let your armor take the hit. If you do, roll your action die. On a 4 or greater, ignore the harm. On a 1-3, ignore the harm but your armor is now broken; you must @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.eece9a67d1961f70]{Repair} and spend 5 repair points to bring it back to working condition.
